action.description: The committee on HLT recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 7 Ayes: Representative(s) Takayama, Keohokapu-Lee Loy, Amato, Hartsfield, Takenouchi, Alcos, Garcia; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 2 Excused: Representative(s) Marten, Olds.
